brief_notes: Human hippocampal neurogenesis snRNA-seq paper. All key numbers match extraction: 10 donors (neonatal day 4, 2 adult 31y/32y, 6 aging 50-68y, 1 stroke 48y), 1F/9M, median 3001 genes/nucleus, 20% mito threshold, pNSC 17.3% (322/1861), aNSC 11.7% (218/1861), qNSC1 23.4% (413/1258), qNSC2 11.1% (214/1258), aged qNSC1 57.8% (310/536), qNSC2 22.6% (121/536). 4 figures. Methods section includes snRNA-seq protocol, scHPF, Monocle, immunostaining. Discussion acknowledges limitations (small n for stroke/neonatal).
